texto: We are on the road to producing a race of men too mentally modest to believe in the multiplication table. We are in danger of seeing philosophers who doubt the law of gravity as being a mere fancy of their own. Scoffers of old time were too proud to be convinced
autor: but these are too humble to be convinced.
explicacao: Citação de but these are too humble to be convinced. sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “We are on the road to producing a race of men too mentally modest to believe in the multiplicatio…” articula saude-mental, g-k-chesterton, orthodoxy em registro de saude mental, com relevância para contextos como viagem e orthodoxy.
